title: [CI:DOCS] Small checkpoint/restore man page fixes
body: At some places the checkpoint restore man pages were using the markdown modifier `**` inside `*..*`. This does not seem to work as intended and results in markdown modifiers present in the final man page. Switching to `__` inside of `*..*` seems to fix this.
